name: DynaMark: A Reinforcement Learning Framework for Dynamic Watermarking in Industrial Machine Tool Controllers
summary: arXiv:2508.21797v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Industry 4.0's highly networked Machine Tool Controllers (MTCs) are prime targets for replay attacks that use outdated sensor data to manip...
description: arXiv:2508.21797v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Industry 4.0's highly networked Machine Tool Controllers (MTCs) are prime targets for replay attacks that use outdated sensor data to manipulate actuators. Dynamic watermarking can reveal such tampering, but current schemes assume linear-Gaussian dynamics and use constant watermark statistics, making them vulnerable to the time-varying,...
author: Navid Aftabi, Abhishek Hanchate, Satish Bukkapatnam, Dan Li
